info.name: PureTask API
info.description: PureTask Backend API Documentation - Uber-style cleaning marketplace

description.content: Create a Stripe checkout session for purchasing credits.

query.description: Maximum number of transactions to return

description.content: Get credit transaction history for the authenticated client.

query.description: Maximum number of purchases to return

description.content: Get history of credit purchases for the authenticated client.

item.name: Create payment intent for buying credits

description.content:
Create a PaymentIntent for buying credits (wallet top-up).
Supports Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate charges.

item.name: Create Stripe checkout session for credit purchases

description.content: Create a Stripe Checkout Session for credit purchases. User will be redirected to Stripe's hosted checkout page.

item.name: Create payment intent for job charge

description.content:
Create a PaymentIntent for a specific job (direct charge).
**NOTE**: This charges base price + surcharge. Use wallet credits to avoid the surcharge.
Create a Stripe PaymentIntent for a job payment.

Handle Stripe webhook events. Requires raw body for signature verification.
This endpoint is called by Stripe, not by clients.
Receive events from n8n workflows. Protected by HMAC signature verification.
Always returns 200 if server is running. Used by load balancers and monitoring.
Verifies database connectivity. Returns 503 if database is not connected.
Get federal holidays. Can query by single date, date range, or list upcoming.
Create a new cleaning job. Requires client role. Supports Idempotency-Key header to prevent duplicate bookings.

Returns jobs based on user role:
- **Client**: Returns all their jobs
- **Cleaner**: Returns assigned jobs and available jobs
- **Admin**: Returns jobs (should use /admin/jobs instead)
Update job details. Client only, only when status = 'requested'.
Cancel a job. Client only.
Get the complete event history for a job, showing all status transitions and actions.

Apply a status transition to a job by triggering an event.
Used for job lifecycle management (accept, start, complete, etc.).

item.name: Get top matched cleaners for job

query.description: Maximum number of candidates to return

description.content:
V1 CORE FEATURE: Get top matched cleaners for client to review and select.
Returns top 5-10 cleaners ranked by match score (reliability, tier, distance, etc.).
Client can then select top 3 to send offers to.

item.name: Send job offers to selected cleaners

description.content:
V1 CORE FEATURE: Client selects cleaners to send job offers to.
Sends job offers to selected cleaners. First cleaner to accept wins.
